identity.name: SoccerMatch
identity.core_philosophy: Dark Mode First. High Contrast. Data is Hero.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and stats numbers. Use uppercase for maximum impact.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap');

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, modal overlays, toast notifications.

textures.noise: Add a subtle noise grain overlay to the entire app body to prevent 'digital flatness'.
textures.grid: Use a faint 20px x 20px grid background in hero sections (opacity 5%).

borders.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Avoid playful rounded-xl.

bento_grid.item: bg-card border border-border p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-background fixed h-full hidden md:block

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm h-12 px-8 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-wide

cards.base: bg-card border border-border/50 text-card-foreground p-6 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30

badges.position: bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/20 uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider px-2 py-1

hero_backgrounds.description: Player action shot for landing page

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px (thin and precise). Size 20px default.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Immediately replace the `tailwind.config.js` colors with the 'The Performance Pro' palette defined above. Force dark mode by default.
2. FONT SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css` immediately.
3. LAYOUT: Do NOT use centered layouts for the dashboard. Use a sidebar (left) + content (right) layout.
4. CARDS: Player cards must look like 'Trading Cards' or 'FIFA Cards' - darker background, sharp borders, stats in a grid.
5. FORMS: Use 'ghost' inputs (transparent bg, bottom border only) for a cleaner look in profile editing, or solid dark inputs for registration.
6. LISTS: Opportunity lists should look like a stock ticker or flight schedule - very tabular, monospaced numbers, high contrast.
7. UNIVERSAL: Avoid all gradients on backgrounds. Use solid colors + subtle noise texture only.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed'.
Do NOT use Purple or Blue as primary colors. Use Electric Green (#22c55e).
Do NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use sharp rounded-sm or rounded-none.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Never center text in the main dashboard view. Left align everything for readability.
